title: BEM-1300 run bundle capture
objective:
Run script: """
import subprocess, sys, json
from pathlib import Path
proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'governance/runtime/local_reenable_bundle_capture.py'], text=True, capture_output=True)
record = {
  'bem_id': 'BEM-1300',
  'release_pass': False,
  'command': 'python governance/runtime/local_reenable_bundle_capture.py',
  'returncode': proc.returncode,
  'ok': proc.returncode == 0,
  'stdout': proc.stdout,
  'stderr': proc.stderr,
  'next_action': 'BEM-1301 decide active workflow re-enable only if capture ok'
}
Path('governance/runtime/BEM1300_RUN_LOCAL_REENABLE_BUNDLE_CAPTURE_RESULT.json').parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/BEM1300_RUN_LOCAL_REENABLE_BUNDLE_CAPTURE_RESULT.json').write_text(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM1300_RUN_LOCAL_REENABLE_BUNDLE_CAPTURE.md').write_text('BEM-1300 | RUN LOCAL RE-ENABLE BUNDLE CAPTURE | 2026-06-01 | 13:54 (UTC+3)

Этап: Run local re-enable bundle capture — 1/1 (100%)
Дорожная карта BEM-931 foundation: 14/14 (100%)

❌ Release PASS is not issued.

| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |
|---|---|---|
| Текущий этап | Run local re-enable bundle capture — 1/1 (100%) | Local proof capture executed |
| Дорожная карта | BEM-931 foundation 14/14 (100%) | Foundation complete; CI re-enable decision pending |
| Следующее действие | BEM-1301 decide active workflow re-enable only if capture ok | Avoid returning broken workflow |
', encoding='utf-8')
with Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md').open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('

### BEM-1300 | RUN LOCAL RE-ENABLE BUNDLE CAPTURE | 2026-06-01 | 13:54 (UTC+3)
- BEM-1299 completed with SHA 07b5cecd90e6786d9e683463073bcea5593c8d12.
- Ran local re-enable bundle capture and wrote result JSON.
- Release PASS not issued.
- Next action: BEM-1301 decide active workflow re-enable only if capture ok.
')
if proc.returncode != 0:
    raise SystemExit(1)
